capability.name: Private Pilot Implementation Blueprint
capability.summary: Define the private implementation path required to move from a public-safe sandbox prototype to a governed utility-to-enterprise outage intelligence pilot.
capability.outcome: A pilot working group can decide what must be implemented privately before partner-facing sandbox traffic or governed operational data is introduced.

non_goals: No private data ingestion in this public repository
No replacement for a formal security or regulatory review

maturity_stages.purpose: Demonstrate workflow, API shape, evidence reports, and public-safe pilot artifacts.
maturity_stages.exit_gate: Readiness gate, scenario matrix, onboarding pack, and public-safe scan pass.

maturity_stages.purpose: Review workflow and integration behavior with synthetic or governed sandbox inputs in a private environment.
maturity_stages.exit_gate: Owners, partner scope, data boundary, and go/no-go criteria are accepted by the pilot steering group.

maturity_stages.purpose: Run controlled partner-facing pilot workflows with approved access, tenant boundary, delivery worker, observability, and governance controls.
maturity_stages.exit_gate: Pilot metrics, security controls, incident runbooks, and data handling rules are approved.

maturity_stages.purpose: Operate as a live service with production ownership, service objectives, compliance controls, and release management.
maturity_stages.exit_gate: Separate production readiness review passes with live operations, rollback, and support ownership.

workstreams.name: Partner Access Boundary
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Sandbox partner profile and lightweight local auth boundary are documented and tested.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Implement partner-scoped access policy, key rotation process, replay window, rate limit, and audit review for partner actions.
workstreams.production_gate: Central partner registry and approved authorization model.

workstreams.name: Tenant And Site Scope Model
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Synthetic site prefixes and partner profiles prove the boundary concept locally.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Move from synthetic prefixes to a governed partner-site authorization source with audited access decisions.
workstreams.production_gate: Managed tenant policy with operational review and migration path.

workstreams.name: Partner-Facing API Contract
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Versioned API routes, idempotency fields, standard errors, and decision objects are implemented.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Freeze pilot request and response fields, error taxonomy, idempotency policy, and compatibility rules.
workstreams.production_gate: Versioned contract governance and change-control process.

workstreams.name: Delivery Worker And Retry Controls
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Local outbox and retry attempts demonstrate retry-safe behavior without network dispatch.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Implement managed delivery worker, receiver verification, retry schedule, dead-letter handling, and delivery audit.
workstreams.production_gate: Operational delivery service with alerting, replay controls, and support ownership.

workstreams.name: Operational Observability
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Operator console, structured lifecycle events, readiness gate, and evidence reports exist.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Define metrics, logs, alerts, dashboards, owner rotation, and incident review cadence for the pilot.
workstreams.production_gate: Live alert routing, service objectives, and incident response runbooks.

workstreams.name: Data Governance And Retention
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Public docs define synthetic boundary, minimization, retention review, and de-identification expectations.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Approve retained fields, retention period, export controls, de-identification method, and review workflow before operational data is used.
workstreams.production_gate: Approved data governance policy and recurring audit.

workstreams.name: Evaluation And Shadow Policy
workstreams.current_public_evidence: ML baseline benchmark and shadow evaluation protocol run on synthetic datasets.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Run side-by-side shadow evaluation on governed pilot rows without changing partner-facing policy.
workstreams.production_gate: Measured promotion criteria, bias review, and operator sign-off for policy changes.

workstreams.name: Deployment And Release Management
workstreams.current_public_evidence: Docker, health checks, tests, coverage gate, and local readiness commands are available.
workstreams.private_pilot_requirement: Create private environment separation, migration process, rollback path, release checklist, and owner approval flow.
workstreams.production_gate: Release automation, rollback verification, environment controls, and support handoff.

freeze_for_private_pilot: incident create request and response shape
field signal request and response shape

alerts: delivery retry backlog exceeds pilot threshold
timeout fallback rate exceeds review threshold
audit completeness drops below pilot threshold
partner scope denial spike requires review

open_decisions.decision: Which partner class and synthetic site scope should be used for the first private sandbox?
Which partner authorization source will be authoritative in the private pilot?
Which operational fields can be retained for evaluation and for how long?
Which service objectives and alert thresholds define pilot success?
